records.ety: [OE. arsmetike, OF. arismetique, L. arithmetica, fr. Gr. <?/ (sc. <?/), fr. <?/ arithmetical, fr. <?/ to number, fr. <?/ number, prob. fr. same root as E. arm, the idea of counting coming from that of fitting, attaching. See Arm. The modern Eng. and French forms are accommodated to the Greek.]

defs: The science of numbers; the art of computation by figures.
A book containing the principles of this science.
